name: Fettuccine Alfredo with Backfin Crabmeat
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot of rapidly boiling water, add olive oil and salt. Bring to a rolling boil.
2. Add the fettuccine noodles to the boiling water and cook for about 6 minutes or until firm but not pasty when crushed between two fingers.
3. Drain the pasta and rinse in cold water until cooled.
4. Toss the chilled pasta with olive oil and refrigerate.
5. If using fresh pasta, briefly blanch in boiling water (90-120 seconds) then toss directly into the prepared Alfredo sauce.
6. Immediately before serving, reheat the chilled pasta by passing it through a strainer back into the boiling water until heated through.
7. Toss the reheated pasta with the Alfredo sauce and serve immediately.
Alfredo Sauce:
1. In a sauté pan, melt butter over medium heat.
2. Add heavy cream and bring to a brisk boil.
3. Gradually whisk in Parmesan cheese until fully incorporated into the creamy mixture.
4. Stir in the crabmeat until heated through.
5. Toss the heated pasta with the sauce gently to avoid tearing the crab meat, then serve hot.
